commands_run: coord claim public-api-rendezvous-receipt "Next carrier proof after PR #3192: add bounded live public API rendezvous nonce receipt using existing public/API surfaces; avoid audio capture, Pastebin/archive posting, APK/JNI, BML compiler, and live-cycle runtime lanes."
failure_reason: Added and ran a live public API rendezvous nonce-hash receipt. The script wrote only a SHA-256 nonce hash to the public runtime event API and read it back publicly, producing event rt_13fdae655ee1 with write_ms=139, read_ms=3876, ttl_ms=600000, public_readable=1, raw_nonce_retained=0, status=pass.
